name: SEP Firmware Loader
description: Loads Apple SEP firmware, splitting it into individually addressed Mach-O modules
longdescription: Parses the Legion2/Legion2P SEP firmware header, extracts every embedded Mach-O (boot stub, kernel, SEPOS root-server, all SEP apps, shared library), maps each one at a distinct 4 GiB-aligned virtual address range, creates properly typed sections, adds entry points and LIEF-derived symbols, and optionally resolves shared-library GOT references.
author: sepsplit-rs / sep-dyld-ida authors
